title: A 'systemic' jet fuel shortage is brewing in Europe — and flights could be hit hard
summary_full: 'We've seen constraints in countries like Vietnam and Thailand on air travel, but this is also spilling over to Europe,' an ING analyst told CNBC.
summary_public: 'We've seen constraints in countries like Vietnam and Thailand on air travel, but this is also spilling over to Europe,' an ING analyst told CNBC.
